_meta.note: Paths are freeform phrases at the table; entries here are examples/templates keyed for the wizard.

lifeOfPrivilege.name: Life of Privilege
lifeOfPrivilege.description: A comfortable, well-resourced upbringing that shapes contacts and expectations.
lifeOfPrivilege.mechanicalEffects: Pick three Skills for this Path (subject to table justification). Society Path instead uses two pantheon Asset Skills plus one more Skill (Origin p. 97). Each Skill can belong to at most two Paths.
lifeOfPrivilege.source: Scion_Origin_(Revised_Download).pdf, Path examples pp. 95–96, Path elements pp. 96–101

childhoodInConflict.name: Childhood in a War Zone
childhoodInConflict.description: Formative years shaped by violence, displacement, or survival pressures.

professionalSoldier.name: Professional Soldier
professionalSoldier.description: Military profession or comparable structured combat role.
professionalSoldier.mechanicalEffects: Three Skills; Role is 'who they are now' (p. 96).

traumaSurgeon.name: Trauma Surgeon
traumaSurgeon.description: High-stakes medicine as identity and practice.
traumaSurgeon.mechanicalEffects: Three Skills; ties to contacts and facilities (p. 100).

daughterOfRiver.name: Daughter of Oya Iyansan
daughterOfRiver.description: Supernatural or cultic tie to a pantheon—often the divine parent thread.
daughterOfRiver.mechanicalEffects: Society Path: two pantheon Asset Skills plus one other Skill you justify (p. 97).
